Because you're already delivering it, and you're already getting paid to deliver that.

To do the executions.

So we had this issue of like new customers being thrown to new people that were managing new people that had no context, right?

And so one of the things we switched with.
It was like creating this strategy sprint.
And so knock on wood, so far we've had 100% conversion of the strategy sprint, which is eight weeks.
It's a paid eight weeks.
So think of it as like instead of having a sales cycle, because our deal sizes are like 200 grand, you know, instead of having a 90-day deal cycle, we have a 30-day deal cycle.
And then we're getting paid for 60 days, but we're like knocking it out of the park.
So then it all converts to a 12-month contract from there, right?

And so there's parts of it that are not quite there.
